SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline

Class SlugImpactForce

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.pipeline.SlugImpactForce
public final class SlugImpactForce extends Object
Standalone liquid-slug momentum impact-force utility for pipework loading screening.

Converts a slug (liquid density, optional gas void fraction, flow area, arrival velocity) into a momentum impact force on a bend or fitting, with an optional dynamic load factor (DLF) to produce a design force. Unlike TransientForceCalculator, this utility does not require a full Method-of-Characteristics transient solution and is intended for fast screening.

Governing relations: 

   F_slug   = rho_eff A v^2                       (axial momentum force)
   F_bend   = 2 rho_eff A v^2 sin(theta/2)        (resultant reaction on a bend)
   F_design = DLF * F_slug
   rho_eff  = (1 - GVF) rho_liquid + GVF rho_gas  (homogeneous slug density)

Standards basis: Energy Institute Guidelines for the avoidance of vibration-induced fatigue failure in process pipework, company flow-induced-vibration (FIV) control guidelines for production systems, and company multiphase-flow-analysis guidance (slug characterisation and GVF).

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim

  • Constructor Details

    • SlugImpactForce

      private SlugImpactForce()
      Non-instantiable static utility class.

  • Method Details

    • effectiveSlugDensity

      public static double effectiveSlugDensity(double liquidDensity, double gasDensity, double gasVoidFraction)
      Homogeneous (no-slip) effective slug density from liquid density, gas density, and gas void fraction.
      Parameters:
      liquidDensity - liquid density [kg/m3]; must be positive
      gasDensity - gas density [kg/m3]; must be non-negative
      gasVoidFraction - gas void fraction in the range [0, 1]
      Returns:
      effective slug density [kg/m3]
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if inputs are out of physical range

    • momentumForce

      public static double momentumForce(double density, double area, double velocity)
      Axial momentum impact force for a fully liquid slug.
      Parameters:
      density - slug density [kg/m3]; must be positive
      area - flow area [m2]; must be positive
      velocity - slug arrival velocity [m/s]
      Returns:
      momentum impact force [N]
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if density or area is non-positive

    • bendForce

      public static double bendForce(double density, double area, double velocity, double bendAngleDeg)
      Resultant reaction force on a bend turning through bendAngleDeg.
      Parameters:
      density - slug density [kg/m3]; must be positive
      area - flow area [m2]; must be positive
      velocity - slug arrival velocity [m/s]
      bendAngleDeg - bend turning angle [deg] in the range [0, 180]
      Returns:
      resultant bend reaction force magnitude [N]
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if density or area is non-positive

    • designForce

      public static double designForce(double liquidDensity, double gasDensity, double area, double velocity, double gasVoidFraction, double dynamicLoadFactor)
      GVF- and DLF-corrected design force for a two-phase slug.
      Parameters:
      liquidDensity - liquid density [kg/m3]; must be positive
      gasDensity - gas density [kg/m3]; must be non-negative
      area - flow area [m2]; must be positive
      velocity - slug arrival velocity [m/s]
      gasVoidFraction - gas void fraction in the range [0, 1]
      dynamicLoadFactor - dynamic load factor (typically 1 to 2)
      Returns:
      design impact force [N]
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if inputs are out of physical range

    • areaFromDiameter

      public static double areaFromDiameter(double diameter)
      Flow area from a pipe internal diameter.
      Parameters:
      diameter - pipe internal diameter [m]; must be positive
      Returns:
      flow area [m2]
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if diameter is non-positive

    • convertForce

      public static double convertForce(double forceNewton, String unit)
      Convert a force in Newtons to a requested force unit.
      Parameters:
      forceNewton - force value [N]
      unit - force unit, one of "N", "kN", or "lbf" (case-insensitive); null defaults to N
      Returns:
      force in the requested unit
